Bus Timings

Bus 31 Timetable Oud Al Mateena Roundabout Terminus to Airport Terminal 2

November 22, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Hey, if you’re looking to get around Dubai without the headache of driving, Bus 31 is your new best friend. This bad boy runs from Airport Terminal 2 all the way to Oud Al Mateena, hitting up a bunch of important spots along the way.

Whether you’re a local trying to get to work or a tourist fresh off the plane, Bus 31 has got you covered. It swings by so often you’ll barely have to check the schedule. Trust me, if you need to bounce between different parts of Dubai without breaking a sweat (or the bank), hop on the 31. It’s a real lifesaver for anyone who wants to skip the traffic and still get where they’re going on time.

Attribute 31
Route Name Oud Al Mateena Roundabout Terminus - Airport Terminal 2, Departure
Route Description Approximately 13-14 kilometers
Total Distance Approximately 1 hour 29 minutes
Total Journey Time 05:30 to 23:12 (Depending on Starting Point)
Operational Hours AED 3
Fare RTA Dubai

Bus 31 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 31 runs frequently throughout the day to accommodate a variety of schedules. Below are the timings for each direction:

From Oud Al Mateena Roundabout Terminus From Airport Terminal 2, Departure

Bus 31 Timetable

Bus Ticket Price

The cost of traveling on Bus 31 is in line with standard Dubai public transport fares, which is AED 3. Passengers can use Nol cards for payment, with prices typically reflecting the distance traveled. Fares are generally affordable, making it an economical option for daily commuting and occasional travel. Additionally, Nol cards offer convenience and can be easily recharged online or at various stations.

Bus Booking

There is no specific online booking system for individual seats on Bus 31. Nol cards, used for payment, can be recharged online via the RTA website or mobile app, adding convenience for frequent travelers. Day passes and multi-day passes are also available for those who require unlimited travel within a specified period.

Bus Route

Bus 31 operates between Oud Al Mateena Roundabout Terminus and Airport Terminal 2, Departure. The route includes several notable stops, providing access to both residential and commercial areas. Key stops along the way include:

  1. Oud Al Mateena Roundabout Terminus

  2. Amaan Street, 2

  3. Amaan Street, 2

  4. Amaan Street, 3

5.

  1. Oud Al Muteena 2, F

  2. Oud Al Muteena 2, G

  3. Oud Al Muteena 2, H

  4. Oud Al Muteena 2, I

  5. Oud Al Muteena 2, Mosque

  6. Oud Al Muteena 2, B

  7. Oud Al Muteena 2, J

  8. Algeria Road 6

  9. Muhaisnah 1A

  10. Muhaisnah 1B

  11. Muhaisnah, 3

  12. Etihad Mall

  13. Etihad Mall, 2

  14. Dubai Modern School

  15. Algeria Street 7

  16. Muhaisnah 1A

  1. Muhaisnah 1B

  2. Islamic School

  3. Etisalat Academy

  4. Ministry of Health

  5. Tunis Road

  7. Etisalat Bus Station · 24

  8. Emirates Cooperative Society

  9. Nahda Road, 2

  10. Al Qusais Metro

  11. Fortune Plaza Hotel

  12. Dubai Airport Free Zone Metro

  13. DM Accommodation

  14. Al Twar 1, Street 16C

  15. Street 16A

  16. Airport Terminal 2, Departure

Bus 31 Station Overview

Oud Al Mateena Roundabout Terminus

The Oud Al Mateena Roundabout Terminus serves as a key endpoint for Bus 31. Located in a quieter residential area, this terminus is essential for residents commuting to various parts of Dubai. Its strategic location near the roundabout allows for easy access to surrounding neighborhoods, ensuring efficient connectivity for daily commuters.

Al Qusais Metro Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Qusais Metro Bus Stop is a crucial transit hub where Bus Routes 13, 31, and 64 intersect. This central location facilitates seamless travel across various parts of the city, offering passengers easy connections to multiple destinations. Its strategic position and diverse route options enhance convenience for daily commuters and travelers navigating the Al Qusais area.

Airport Terminal 2, Departure

Situated conveniently at the departure area of Dubai International Airport, this station is designed for seamless connectivity, providing quick and direct access to the terminal.

With modern amenities like digital screens displaying real-time flight and bus schedule information, it ensures a hassle-free travel experience for passengers. Whether heading to or from the airport, this well-maintained stop offers efficient transit options across the city.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The Bus 31 route passes by several notable tourist attractions and destinations in Dubai:

  1. Etihad Mall: Located on the route, this shopping center offers a variety of retail options, dining experiences, and entertainment facilities.

  2. Dubai Modern School: While primarily an educational institution, the surrounding area often has community events that can be of interest.

  3. Al Qusais Metro Station: Close to cultural and shopping spots, this area is well-connected for further exploration of Dubai.

  4. Fortune Plaza Hotel: A notable hotel in the area, offering convenient accommodation for travelers.

  5. Dubai Airport Free Zone Metro: Provides easy access to the Dubai Airport Free Zone, an important business district.

Journey Experience

Taking bus route 31 from Oud Al Mateena Roundabout Terminus to Airport Terminal 2 offers a long yet intriguing journey through various districts of Dubai. Starting from Oud Al Mateena, a quieter residential area, the bus travels through the city’s vibrant neighborhoods, giving passengers glimpses of local life and culture.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can easily travel to Airport Terminal 2, Departure, the furthest point on the Bus 31 route, starting from Oud Al Mateena Roundabout Terminus. The app provides a convenient way to plan your journey, with a price range of AED 54-65 for the trip. This allows for a smooth and efficient travel experience, ensuring you reach your destination comfortably.

Its frequent service and extensive route make it a valuable option for both daily commuters and occasional travelers. With its accessibility to popular spots, it offers a convenient choice for exploring the city.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: November 22, 2025.
